  \caption[Spectral SNR per probe: ratio of paddle-frequency FFT amplitude to wind-noise amplitude integrated over the 0]{
    Spectral SNR per probe: ratio of paddle-frequency FFT amplitude to wind-noise amplitude integrated over the 0.1\,Hz FFT window at each paddle frequency (108 wave runs; wind-noise baseline from 6 full-wind no-wave runs). Horizontal lines: SNR~=~10 (dotted grey), 5 (dashed black), 3 (dotted red, critical). SNR~$<$~3 indicates wind dominates the FFT measurement.
  }
  \label{fig:ch04_wind_snr}
